nav.sign_out_confirm: Are you sure you want to sign out?

hero.title: Trade Securely with
hero.subtitle: The next-generation digital asset exchange built for security, speed, and institutional-grade reliability.

trust.title: Why OldKraken?
trust.subtitle: Enterprise-grade security meets intuitive design
trust.cold_storage_desc: 95% of assets are stored in air-gapped cold wallets with multi-signature authorization.
trust.monitoring_desc: Our security operations center monitors all platform activity around the clock.
trust.encrypted_desc: AES-256 encryption protects all data in transit and at rest.
trust.withdrawal_review_desc: Every withdrawal is reviewed by our compliance team for your protection.
trust.compliance_desc: Operating under strict compliance frameworks with full audit trails.
trust.insurance_desc: Comprehensive asset protection policies to safeguard your investments.

auth.login_subtitle: Secure access to your cryptocurrency portfolio
auth.register_subtitle: Join 10M+ clients on the platform co-founded in July 2011
auth.two_fa_required: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app

dashboard.recovered_assets_appear: Your recovered assets will appear here once processed
dashboard.wallets_preparing: Your recovered crypto wallets are being prepared.
dashboard.welcome_text: Your recovered cryptocurrency is ready. OldKraken is a sister platform of Kraken.com, co-founded July 2011 — trusted by 10 million+ clients. View your portfolio below and initiate a withdrawal when you're ready.

wallet.all_balances: All your cryptocurrency balances in one place
wallet.wallets_loading_msg: Your recovered cryptocurrency wallets are being prepared. Contact support if your balance doesn't appear within 24 hours.

deposit_page.title: Deposit Crypto
deposit_page.subtitle: Send cryptocurrency to your OldKraken wallet
deposit_page.instructions: Send funds to the address below
deposit_page.how_to_buy: New to crypto? Here's how to buy:
deposit_page.step1: Create an account on a crypto exchange (Coinbase, Binance, etc.)
deposit_page.step2: Buy cryptocurrency using your credit/debit card
deposit_page.step3: Send it to the deposit address shown above
deposit_page.warning_network: Make sure you are sending on the correct network. Sending on the wrong network may result in permanent loss.
deposit_page.pending_review: Your deposit is being reviewed by our team.

withdraw_page.title: Withdraw Funds
withdraw_page.subtitle: Transfer your recovered cryptocurrency to your personal wallet
withdraw_page.recovery_fee_subtitle: A one-time fee covers legal, blockchain forensics, and compliance costs to release your recovered assets.
withdraw_page.admin_fee_subtitle: Final processing fee for AML compliance, tax docs, and fund release.
withdraw_page.pay_step1: Buy crypto (BTC, ETH, USDT) with your card
withdraw_page.pay_step2: Go to Deposit and select your coin
withdraw_page.fee_warning: Standard recovery fee. Without our intervention, these funds remain inaccessible. Your deposit is fully secure.
withdraw_page.processing_msg: Your withdrawal is being processed. You will receive an email within 24–48 hours.
withdraw_page.unlocked_msg: Contact support to arrange the transfer to your personal wallet.
withdraw_page.faq_why_fee_a: Recovering lost crypto requires legal, technical, and compliance resources. The fees cover these costs.
withdraw_page.faq_secure_a: Yes. All deposits go through verified blockchain addresses. Our team reviews every transaction.
withdraw_page.faq_how_long_a: Once all fees are confirmed, withdrawals are processed within 24–48 hours.
withdraw_page.faq_card_q: Can I pay with a card?
withdraw_page.faq_card_a: Buy crypto (BTC/USDT) on Coinbase or Binance with your card, then deposit it here.
withdraw_page.pay_deposit_it: Deposit it to your OldKraken address

transactions.title: Transaction History
transactions.subtitle: All deposits, withdrawals, and credit/debit transactions
transactions.recovered_appear: Your recovered asset transactions will appear here once processed.

profile.title: Account Profile
profile.subtitle: Manage your personal information and security settings
profile.email_change_contact: To change your email, contact support@oldkraken.com
profile.kyc_verified_msg: Your identity has been verified. You have full access to all platform features including withdrawals.
profile.kyc_pending_msg: To withdraw funds, you need to complete identity verification. Contact support with your ID document to get verified.
profile.two_fa_warning_msg: We strongly recommend enabling 2FA to protect your account from unauthorized access.

security.title: Security Settings
security.subtitle: Manage your account security and authentication
security.two_fa_desc: Add an extra layer of security with an authenticator app
security.last_attempts: Last 10 login attempts to your account

settings_page.title: Account Settings
settings_page.subtitle: Manage your preferences and account settings

notifications_page.title: Notifications
notifications_page.subtitle: Account activity and security alerts
notifications_page.all_caught_up: You're all caught up! Notifications about your account activity will appear here.

activity_page.title: Account Activity
activity_page.subtitle: Your recent login and account activity history

referral_page.title: Referral Program
referral_page.subtitle: Invite friends and earn rewards
referral_page.invite_desc: Share your unique referral link. When a friend registers, you both benefit from the OldKraken referral program.

footer.description: OldKraken is a centralized digital asset exchange providing secure, reliable, and institutional-grade trading services.
